name: @chauhaidang/xq-harness-domain-test-mcp
description: MCP server exposing REST API test tools for XQ E2E API scenarios

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:test: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-test', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json

author: chauhaidang
